name: Longrider
description: A single-barrel shotgun built for precision rather than spray. Its tight spread and higher accuracy make it much easier to place pellets deliberately than most shotguns, but the low pellet count and small magazine mean it demands careful aim and frequent reloads.
notes: On Gaige, Smaller, Lighter, Faster and some Punk class mod setups can reduce the magazine to zero, preventing the gun from functioning at all. A 1-shot magazine version is useful for building Anarchy stacks quickly without accidental reloads. Zer0 benefits from the strong mid-range accuracy and extra critical-hit potential, while Krieg can use the fast emptying magazine to trigger Empty the Rage reliably at close range.
